LanguageData.PFP_BingePreferredFood.label: preference-seeking food binge
LanguageData.PFP_BingePreferredFood.beginLetter: {0} has gone too long without eating preferred food and is binging on anything that satisfies [PAWN_possessive] craving.
LanguageData.PFP_BingePreferredFood.recoveryMessage: {0} is no longer binging on preferred food.
LanguageData.PFP_BingePreferredFood.baseInspectLine: Mental state: Binging on preferred food
